reviews.review_description: Trying to watch the All Stsr game and it keeps saying my credentials are not valid. Changed my password and everything and still not able to log in. Very frustrating.

Needs improvement on connection . Also needs to show game replays more often because I was waiting for a long time to show the replay of Golden State vs Lakers and it still has not come out yet. Overall on a scale of 1 to 10 I’ll give it an 8 out of 10

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback!  Our goal is to constantly enhance and improve our fan experience and we hope to add additional content in the future.  Currently we are limited on the number of VR-Capable feeds we can broadcast and we experienced issues at the arena for the GSW v LAL game.  We apologize immensely and hope you will enjoy our special coverage of NBA All-Star events!

reviews.review_description: This game was only partially available live in 21st. Did not get to watch entire game. I just checked back in and only find highlights available. Where is recording of FULL GAME? I want to watch entire game.

developer_response.body: We were having technical difficulties getting our transmission live. We are sorry for any inconvenience this may have caused.

reviews.review_description: I tried to join but it woukdnt let me. It took me in the TNT room and I would click on the game but nothing happened. Very disappointed because I was looking forward to watching

developer_response.body: We were having technical difficulties getting our transmission live. We are sorry for any inconvenience this may have caused.

reviews.review_title: So when is the game coming on?!
reviews.review_description: I look forward to these games on the app, so it sucks that it’s not working tonight.

developer_response.body: We were having technical difficulties getting our transmission live. We are sorry for any inconvenience this may have caused.

reviews.review_description: I wish I could give this app negative 10 stars.This has got to be the worst app for oculus. Games are never current and the few that have been current don’t work. Log in to a game scheduled for today and it says upcoming on them as then never starts. Either do it right or just remove yourself and let league pass do it correctly. Waste of time.

developer_response.body: We are having technical difficulty getting our transmission live.  We are sorry for this delay.  We will be up very shortly.

reviews.review_description: The Lakers and warriors game will not play on VR, and it's a scheduled game. It just says nothing and has the date wrong.  The dates say 1/21/2019. And that's today! So why won't it play?????

developer_response.body: We are having technical difficulty getting our transmission live.  We are sorry for this delay.  We will be up very shortly.

reviews.review_description: I bought an Oculus Go to pretty much watch NBA, and then waited a month for NBA on TNT VR to finally have a game availabe to watch live. Stayed up late to catch the Warriors vs Lakers game, and then the app doesnt allow me (and hundreds of others judging by the reviews) to click on the game. “Upcoming” although the game is now mid way through the 2nd quarter. Very disappointed with this app

developer_response.body: We were having technical difficulties getting our transmission live. We are sorry for any inconvenience this may have caused.

reviews.review_description:
So I streamed the rockets vs warriors tonight. First the video was really difficult on the eyes but after some time my eyes were able to focus and I was able to enjoy the game. I do wish you could use the app like in the commercial where you and a friend can go to the game. I do wish they didn’t over hype that PRT. Overall the app was a good experience for me. Didn’t have to many glitches. I did however notice switching camera angle took a little longer than expected. So if you seen the ball get inbounded if you didn’t switch immediately you might miss a scoring opportunity. Thanks for putting this app on oculus go!

Update** 
Why aren’t the games working anymore. I am trying to watch the lakers vs Warriors and it states it’s upcoming even though it almost an hour into the game

developer_response.body: We were having technical difficulties getting our transmission live. We are sorry for any inconvenience this may have caused.

reviews.review_description: I agree with the previous review. Have been waiting & waiting to see this game and just as he described... nothing!!! WTH???

developer_response.body: We were having technical difficulties getting our transmission live. We are sorry for any inconvenience this may have caused.

reviews.review_description: Why can't I view warriors games in my area. 94553. I bought this to have access and be court side

developer_response.body:
We're sorry, but the NBA on TNT VR experience through Oculus includes select nationally broadcast TNT games.  Not all games will be broadcast in VR, please visit nba.com/xr/schedule to view the selection of all NBA games available in VR. 

If you are an NBA League Pass subscriber, your blackout will be based upon whether the game is available over the air in your area.  NBA League Pass is designed to allow you to watch out-of-market games live, so games that are not nationally or locally broadcast. Please visit http://www.nba.com/leaguepass/blackouts to find out more information about blackout restrictions on NBA League Pass.

reviews.review_description:
I can log into my tnt app in my phone but in the oculus headset it keeps asking me to log into my acct. the full games are locked and I can only watch short clips..
I’m looking to watch full classic nba games, all star games etc...on the headset. 
I have the tnt & espn apps..the oculus didn’t even allow me log into nbatv or anything the screen does a weird freeze thing where I can’t pick which subscription I have.. 
please help





Update to developer, the installing and reinstalling didn’t work, full games are still locked and it’s still asking me to sign in with my credentials

developer_response.body: We apologize for the inconvenience. Can you please attempt to uninstall and reinstall the Oculus app and clear the cache on the app to see if you are able to login after updating the app? Please let us know if the issue persists.

reviews.review_title: Amazing, well done and Bravo TNT
reviews.review_description: I don't know what lag or stuff others are talking about I've never had it lag once. But I have real good internet and nice router. Not a single issue at all. I only even came in here to say hats off to TNT for even bothering to bring this to us. So few VR users yet this courtside seats are to die for, thanks.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review - we are happy to hear how much you enjoy using our app and hope that we can continue to keep you satisfied!

reviews.review_description: I am currently trying to watch a scheduled live game during the time it was scheduled (DAL vs SAS), but it only say upcoming. Every time I try to click on it nothing happens. It also does not ask me to log in with my cable credentials. If there is a log in button, I can't find it anywhere.

developer_response.body: We apologize for the inconvenience, and for the delay. We are aware of this issue and are working towards resolving it. We hope to have the archive available soon.

reviews.review_description: DAL vs SAS say "upcoming" but it's currently going on. Chris Weber was even advertising it on the live broadcast yet it doesn't work.

developer_response.body: We apologize for the inconvenience, and for the delay. We are aware of this issue and are working towards resolving it. We hope to have the archive available soon.

reviews.review_description: I like many others can not get the app to even open.  This is absurd

developer_response.body: We are very sorry that you experienced these difficulties in our app. Have you tried uninstalling the Oculus app itself? Also try logging out of the Oculus app and power cycling your headset. If you are still experiencing issues after those steps please submit a ticket at https://leaguepasssupport.nba.com/app/ContactUs.
